mission.title: helm: helm upgrade --install no longer works
mission.description: helm upgrade --install no longer works. This issue affects 57+ users.

steps.title: Identify helm upgrade symptoms
steps.description:
Check for the issue in your helm installation:
```bash
helm version --short
helm repo list
```
Look for errors or warnings that may indicate the issue.

steps.title: Review helm configuration
steps.description:
Review the relevant helm configuration:
As of helm v2.7.1, after updating tiller, running helm upgrade --install flag no longer works. The following error is displayed: Error: UPGRADE FAILED: "${RELEASE}" has no deployed releases. Downgrading to v2.7.0 or v2.6.2 does not produce the error.

steps.title: Apply the fix for helm upgrade --install no longer works
steps.description:
`helm list` should only list latest release
```yaml
$>helm ls -a|grep ingress
nginx-ingress            	9       	Thu Nov 30 11:33:06 2017	FAILED  	nginx-ingress-0.8.2        	kube-ingress
nginx-ingress            	11      	Thu Nov 30 11:37:58 2017	FAILED  	nginx-ingress-0.8.2        	kube-ingress
nginx-ingress            	12      	Thu Nov 30 11:38:50 2017	FAILED  	nginx-ingress-0.8.2        	kube-ingress
nginx-ingress            	8       	Thu Nov 30 11:31:27 2017	FAILED  	nginx-ingress-0.8.2        	kube-ingress
nginx-ingress            	10      	Thu Nov 30 11:33:53 2017	FAILED  	nginx-ingress-0.8.2        	kube-ingress
$>helm diff nginx-ingres
```

steps.title: Confirm helm upgrade --install no longer works is resolved
steps.description:
Verify the fix by checking that the original error no longer occurs:
Test helm to confirm the issue is resolved.
Confirm that the issue symptoms are gone.

resolution.summary: See the fix PR for the community-verified solution: https://github.com/helm/helm/pull/3335

prerequisites.description: A working helm installation or development environment.
